short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $4.24B in FY2026 Q1, +4.7% YoY — stable trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $2.80B (-34.0% vs current Q) — set by 28 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $3.75.
Next earnings: 2026-08-05 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is mixed — execution risk on the next guide is elevated.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $15B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $11B → FY2 $12B (+4.5% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 14.0% — average operating profile over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: +42.9% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Energy): Commodity-cycle exposure + capital discipline — long-cycle return-on-capital story.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · trading window)

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 39.0% — normal.
Put/Call OI: 0.64 — call-heavy positioning (consensus bullish).
30-day implied move: ±10.4% ($179.83 – $221.59) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -1.24pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).
Front-month OI cluster: $210.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Bull call spread 30 DTE: long $201 / short $211. Mid IV (39%) + uptrend → defined-risk directional with reasonable cost basis.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 37.5% across 6 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 6 dates spanning 118–608 DTE.
390-day implied move: ±38.9% ($122.63 – $278.79) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $170 (-15.3% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Flat term structure (-1.4pp) — no near-term event premium; long-dated vol fairly priced.
long_term.strategy: Sell 90-day cash-secured put at $187 (7% OTM). Uptrend + acceptable IV → income strategy with willingness to take ownership at lower cost basis. Roll if untested; assigned position becomes long-term hold.
